tasks.subject: Task 1: SQLite schema & data access layer (routes_db.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pytest config + fully-tested routes_db.py with schema and CRUD (leads_cache, lotes, sublotes, sublote_leads).

**Files:**
- Create: pytest.ini
- Create: routes_db.py
- Test: tests/test_routes_db.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_routes_db.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pytest.ini", "routes_db.py", "tests/test_routes_db.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_db.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["init_db creates all 4 tables", "upsert_lead idempotent by place_id", "set_geocode_result updates lat/lng/source", "get_pending_geocode returns pendiente+fallido", "get_candidate_pool excludes leads shared <30 days ago", "create_lote/create_sublote persist relationships", "mark_lote_compartido marks all its sublotes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Maps_URL coordinate parsing (routes_geocoding.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract lat/lng directly from a Google Maps URL when present.

**Files:**
- Create: routes_geocoding.py
- Test: tests/test_routes_geocoding_parse.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_routes_geocoding_parse.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_geocoding.py", "tests/test_routes_geocoding_parse.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_geocoding_parse.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Parses @lat,lng from standard Maps URL", "Returns None when no coord segment", "Returns None for empty/missing input", "Handles positive and negative coordinates"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Nominatim geocoding + fallback chain (routes_geocoding.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rate-limited Nominatim geocoding with retries, plus the full per-lead fallback chain and a free-text geocoder for origins.

**Files:**
- Modify: routes_geocoding.py
- Modify: requirements.txt
- Test: tests/test_routes_geocoding_chain.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_routes_geocoding_chain.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_geocoding.py", "requirements.txt", "tests/test_routes_geocoding_chain.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_geocoding_chain.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nominatim_geocode respects rate limit and retries", "geocode_lead follows fallback chain URL->direccion->negocio->fallido", "geocode_free_text works for manual origin text", "no real network calls in tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Route ordering algorithm (routes_algorithm.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure functions: haversine distance, N-nearest selection, nearest-neighbor ordering, sub-lote chunking.

**Files:**
- Create: routes_algorithm.py
- Test: tests/test_routes_algorithm_ordering.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_routes_algorithm_ordering.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_algorithm.py", "tests/test_routes_algorithm_ordering.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_algorithm_ordering.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["haversine_meters correct", "select_n_nearest sorted and capped", "order_nearest_neighbor correct", "chunk_into_sublotes preserves order, max 9"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Google Maps link builder (routes_algorithm.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate a valid Google Maps directions URL (origin + up to 8 waypoints + destination).

**Files:**
- Modify: routes_algorithm.py
- Test: tests/test_routes_algorithm_maps_link.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_routes_algorithm_maps_link.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_algorithm.py", "tests/test_routes_algorithm_maps_link.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_algorithm_maps_link.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single stop has no waypoints", "multi stop has correct waypoints/destination", "raises ValueError on invalid stop counts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Sheet sync (routes_sheet_sync.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read all 3 Sheet tabs, upsert into leads_cache deduplicated by Place_ID (or synthetic key), geocode pending/failed rows.

**Files:**
- Create: routes_sheet_sync.py
- Test: tests/test_routes_sheet_sync.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_routes_sheet_sync.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_sheet_sync.py", "tests/test_routes_sheet_sync.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_sheet_sync.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reads 3 tabs with correct categoria", "dedup by place_id", "skips rows without Negocio", "synthetic place_id fallback", "geocodes pending/failed rows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Batch generation orchestration (routes_batch.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** generate_lote() ties together candidate selection, ordering, chunking, and persistence with chained sub-lote origins.

**Files:**
- Create: routes_batch.py
- Test: tests/test_routes_batch.py

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_routes_batch.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_batch.py", "tests/test_routes_batch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_routes_batch.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["raises on non-geocodable origin", "selects and orders nearest candidates", "chains sub-lote origins correctly", "persists lote/sublotes/leads", "handles smaller-than-n pool"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Flask blueprint & UI (routes_app.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flask Blueprint exposing generation form, results, sync, sharing, historial, and fallidos pages.

**Files:**
- Create: routes_app.py

**Verify:** Manual — no automated Flask/UI tests per approved design spec. Verified end-to-end in Task 9.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["routes_app.py"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["home form loads", "generar shows sublotes or error", "sincronizar handles errors gracefully", "compartir routes work", "fallidos and historial pages work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Wire into app.py and smoke-test end-to-end
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register the blueprint on the existing Flask app, init the SQLite db on startup, verify manually.

**Files:**
- Modify: app.py:14

**Verify:** pytest -v, then manual smoke test per plan Task 9 Step 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app starts", "/rutas/ loads", "existing routes unaffected", "full suite passes"]}
```
